arms_mandatory_baselines: smaller-model-alone (R1, SmolLM2-135M) — lift baseline, separation gate, headroom gate
larger-model-alone (R3, SmolLM2-1.7B) — separation gate + the non-inferiority reference on external gold

shuffled-kernel-verify-retry (oracle-CONTENT null carried over from f2b-replicate: identical retry topology and cost, record content decoupled from items by a seed-pinned Sattolo derangement, map recorded; LOAD-BEARING and the one control NOT to cut)

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against the EXTERNALLY-ADJUDICATED gold label (blind dual-judge protocol, data/d-adj-t, hash-pinned before stage 1; pinned item order) — the scoring rule for EVERY endpoint; this is the ground-truth-independence measurement
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against membership gold (the kernel-defined labels, as in d-qa-r) on the SAME runs — DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, feeds the dual-scoring contrast lift_mem - lift_ext (the circularity-signature diagnostic); never an endpoint
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_mem

dependent_vars.definition: external-gold eval-set accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component); store = unique canonical record bytes
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier CPU work metered at the pinned rate (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: training FLOPs / steps / tokens-to-target (V component; 0 — inference-only)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

n_planned.adjudication: STAGE 1, before any GPU: two blind judges (judge-1 human, kernel-naive; judge-2 human if available else pre-declared cross-vendor Codex/GPT-5.5 fallback at temperature 0 with pinned prompt, E5 leak-checked-judge discipline) + blind tie-break judge-3 on discordant pairs; provenance-blind rendering, per-judge pinned shuffle seeds dadjt/1|judge-<n>|20260710, mandatory cannot-say escape; concordant escape => CONTENT-UNDECIDED (counts as NON-agreement in A, excluded from the eval set — evidence, not an instrument event); unresolved after tie-break => instrument event (capped 15%). Labels hash-pinned (d-adj-t ops amendment) BEFORE the stage-1 record is appended and never revisited; the stage-2 runner fail-closes on the pin
n_planned.adjudication_instrument_gate: G-adj (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL): n_adjudicated >= 300 AND unresolved-disagreement <= 15% of adjudicated AND raw two-judge agreement >= 0.80 (escapes count as a category); judge-quality failures are instrument events and cannot masquerade as evidence about the kernel

assumptions.claim: circularity rationale: on d-qa/d-qa-r the gold answers were DEFINED by the same string-equality the verifier checks, so verifier acceptance == gold by construction; this experiment is built to separate REAL-CONTENT from CIRCULAR by replacing the gold-definition step with blind external adjudication — it presumes neither reading

public-benchmark items cannot adjudicate this fork: the deterministic verifier engages only kernel-rendered surfaces — in f2b-replicate the verify arm's d-ext (OpenBookQA) vectors are byte-identical to model-alone at every seed (acc 0.242 = 0.242, 0 flips, seeds 0/1/2; results-log/f2b-replicate.jsonl) because all 500 d-ext items are kernel_checkable=false and the verifier abstains on 100%; a benchmark-slice run would be no-lift under BOTH hypotheses (over-determined) and is therefore dropped from this design

blind adjudication as external gold: judges naive to the kernel, provenance-blind item rendering, mandatory cannot-say escape, style-balanced options/claims (all options and both claim polarities are kernel-rendered by construction, so register cannot cue the intended answer); protocol frozen verbatim in prereg_doc §4; judge sourcing (second human vs pre-declared cross-vendor LLM fallback under E5 leak-checked-judge discipline) recorded in d-adj-t and disclosed in every readout

fresh-runs pre-commitment: the logged-result reuse ruling is under revision at design time, so no logged cell is consumed as an arm output; every arm cell is a fresh final-phase run under this record's prereg_hash; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with the pre-committed decision 'proceed-with-reason: fresh-runs pre-commitment of the frozen design'

single-draw rule: d-qa-t is built ONCE from the pre-committed generator seed dqat/1|f2b-transfer|20260710 and adjudicated ONCE; any re-draw or re-adjudication before freeze requires a correction record under registry/corrections/f2b-transfer/, and after freeze a new experiment id — this forecloses drawing items until stage 1 passes

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice
planning constants (cost anchors, throughput, judge effort) are dry-plan ESTIMATES only and are never emitted as measurements

nothing here amends f2b-replicate: its audit-confirmed PASS, its envelope, and its assessment stand exactly as issued; this record tests the residual its does_not_license section foregrounded (content-specificity != ground-truth independence) and was gated on that PASS

n_planned.dropped_arms: trained-PRM (HC3 closed at and indexed to the 1.5B class in f2b-replicate; transfer does not reopen that fork), kernel-as-text (Law-2 passive null settled at this scope; no claim here needs it), d-ext benchmark slice (measured degenerate — see the MEASURED assumption; replaced by this experiment's entire externally-adjudicated eval set), R2, k-ladder (fixed k=4), gold-oracle, cascades, int4, RAG, self-consistency — right-size; their prior readings stand
n_planned.endorsement_gate: STAGE-1 KILL (d), pre-GPU: A = n_agree_membership / (n_adjudicated - n_unresolved) — agreement of blind external gold with membership gold, concordant cannot-say counting as disagreement; FAIL fires iff one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound of A < 0.70; evaluable from the adjudication-instrument record alone, so the FAIL verdict is producible with ZERO GPU spend
n_planned.engagement_gate: the RT-7a fix made structural (INSTRUMENT-INVALID on failure): every kernel-verify-retry cell must emit verifier_engagement {n_items, n_decidable, n_attempt0_rejected, n_final_differs_attempt0}; gate requires decidable_fraction >= 0.95 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0, summed over verify cells; a missing engagement block is itself a gate failure. Rejection rate 0 is the F2/d-ext vacuity signature (verify == alone byte-identical); rate ~1 with no acceptance is the never-accepts degeneracy — neither may ever read as a hypothesis outcome
n_planned.fresh_items: data/d-qa-t: 360 kernel-covered, kernel_checkable=true items over the 108 covered concepts, generator seed dqat/1|f2b-transfer|20260710 (pre-committed verbatim in prereg_doc §3.1), ID namespace dqat:, leak rule LC8-t fail-closed (full-prompt-surface disjointness from ALL 650 d-qa items AND all 1000 d-qa-r items; reference corpora byte-pinned inside the builder, DQAT_ERR_REFPIN on drift); built by data/d-qa-t/build-dqat.py — same four item templates, same canonical-record rendering and fail-closed leak machinery as the committed data/d-qa-r/build-dqar.py, with a RE-AUTHORED availability-aware per-concept plan sized to exactly 360 (per concept: def-match + term-match + TRUE-preferring claim; plus a 36-concept fourth-item claim subset prioritising concepts with fresh claim segments remaining — claim-true supply is bounded by prior d-qa/d-qa-r surface consumption at 57 fresh segments over 43 concepts, MEASURED; LC7 enforces yes/no <= 0.75 fail-closed; NO LLM item authorship; prereg_doc §3.1 records why no seed-and-count change of build-dqar.py can reach 360). EVAL SET = the first 250 externally-labelled items in pinned rank order (deterministic prefix; floor 200, below which the runner refuses)
n_planned.headroom_gate: acc_ext(R1-alone, 3-seed mean) <= 0.85 else INSTRUMENT-INVALID: a saturated baseline cannot measure a lift and must not read as NULL or FAIL
n_planned.holm_family: ONE family F-secondary(f2b-t), membership pre-declared: beats_gloss_self_verify, shuffled_low_recovery (recovery ub95 < 0.30 on the external-gold lift), plus — conditional on the separation gate — noninferiority_vs_r3 (external-gold acc of the verify arm non-inferior to 1.7B-alone at margin 0). Reported-only, never Holm, never verdict-bearing: external endorsement A with CI, dual-scoring contrast lift_mem - lift_ext with CI, transfer_ratio, seed-sign (3/3), cost_ratio_vs_R3
n_planned.iface_gate: P10 unchanged from f2b-replicate: >= 300 labelled outputs at the verifier host rung (R1), re-verified mechanically from the pinned d-xif labelled set through THIS harness's extraction machinery; extraction-failure Wilson-LB > 10% => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (instrument events, never hypothesis events)
n_planned.power: advisor/P8 carry-over from the f2b-replicate right-size: n=250 items x 3 paired seeds gives ~0.92 one-sided power at absolute Delta=0.10 for the paired primary; the fixed pre-registered k=4 removes retry-budget selection from the bootstrap entirely (no sweep, no in-resample selection); stage-1 endorsement gate powered at n_planned=360 (Wilson LB at expected 0.85 is 0.816 > 0.70 bar)
n_planned.separation_gate: instrument gate on EXTERNAL gold, pre-declared, gating ONLY the noninferiority_vs_r3 Holm member: acc_ext(R3-alone) - acc_ext(R1-alone) >= 0.05 (3-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure that secondary leaves the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison (the gate is a deterministic function of the alone arms only); the absolute primary always reads
n_planned.stage_discipline: STAGE 1 BEFORE ANY GPU: build d-qa-t -> freeze -> adjudicate -> pin d-adj-t (ops amendment fills the declared placeholder) -> append the adjudication-instrument final-phase record -> verdict-gen; FAIL (kill d) stops the experiment at ~$0 GPU; INCOMPLETE-DATA (stage-1 passed, fields for later rules unset — fail closed) is the lawful intermediate state licensing stage 2; then reuse-check + dry-plan + mock before the single-GPU final run

endpoints.test: ABSOLUTE superiority on EXTERNALLY-ADJUDICATED gold (no denominator, margin 0): effect_size = acc_ext(135M + kernel-verify-retry, the single pre-registered retry budget k=4) - acc_ext(135M-alone); paired item BCa bootstrap (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260710), one-sided alpha=0.05; reject iff the one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0. Accuracies are seed-averaged per-item means on the 250-item externally-labelled d-qa-t eval set (P8 §1.2/§1.7 discipline). This is the ground-truth-independence primary: gold here is fixed by blind judges, never by the kernel's string-equality

STAGE-1 endorsement statistic (measured rate, reported with Wilson bound; the kill-d trigger): A = share of resolved blind adjudications whose external gold equals membership gold (concordant cannot-say = disagreement); FAIL (kill d) fires iff one-sided 95% Wilson LB < 0.70 — evaluable before any GPU spend

G-adj INSTRUMENT gate (not a hypothesis test): n_adjudicated >= 300 AND unresolved-disagreement <= 15% AND raw two-judge agreement >= 0.80; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (judge-quality events never read as evidence about the kernel)

RT-7a engagement INSTRUMENT gate: over kernel-verify-retry cells, decidable_fraction >= 0.95 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0; missing engagement block => gate failure; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (the F2/d-ext vacuity signature can never again read as a hypothesis outcome)
headroom INSTRUMENT gate: acc_ext(R1-alone, 3-seed mean) <= 0.85; a saturated baseline cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never NULL/FAIL

external-gold separation INSTRUMENT gate, pre-declared (gates ONLY the noninferiority_vs_r3 Holm membership): acc_ext(R3-alone) - acc_ext(R1-alone) >= 0.05 (3-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure that secondary leaves the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison; the absolute primary still reads

H-STRUCT carry-over on external gold, THE load-bearing control: recovery = (acc_ext(shuffled-verify,k=4) - acc_ext(R1-alone)) / (acc_ext(kernel-verify,k=4) - acc_ext(R1-alone)); passes iff the one-sided 95% BCa upper bound < 0.30; Holm within F-secondary(f2b-t). The KILL (clause b) fires on the POINT estimate >= 0.30 regardless of this test

RT-2 carry-over on external gold: one-sided paired bootstrap vs gloss-text self-verify+retry at matched budget, both arms at the fixed k=4; the kernel arm cannot PASS without beating this; Holm within F-secondary(f2b-t) at alpha=0.05

the efficiency headline re-tested against honest gold: acc_ext(135M+kernel-verify,k=4) - acc_ext(1.7B-alone), one-sided 95% BCa lower bound >= 0 (absolute non-inferiority at margin 0); Holm within F-secondary(f2b-t); CONDITIONAL on the separation gate (else INSTRUMENT-INVALID, excluded from the family before any p comparison)

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (never Holm, never verdict-bearing): lift_mem - lift_ext on the same runs with 95% percentile CI, plus transfer_ratio = lift_ext/lift_mem — the circularity-signature diagnostic (H-CIRC predicts lift_mem >> lift_ext ~ 0; H-TRANSFER predicts a small gap)
C-4 robustness gate, reported-only (does NOT gate the PASS): >= ceil(0.8 * n_seeds) = 3/3 sampling seeds same-direction verifier lift over R1-alone on external gold

P10 extraction-failure instrument gate at the verifier host rung (R1), unchanged from f2b-replicate: extraction-success Wilson-LB must clear 0.90 at n>=300 labelled outputs (equivalently failure Wilson-LB <= 0.10); measured by mechanical re-verification of the pinned d-xif set

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any PASS: 2 host rungs (135M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope; every claim is scoped to <=1.7B hosts, kernel-covered kernel-RENDERED templated definitional QA over the 108 covered concepts, the fixed k=4 retry budget, and THIS gold standard — blind dual-judge external adjudication under the pinned d-adj-t protocol, judge panel and sourcing disclosed. A PASS removes exactly ONE confound from the f2b-replicate envelope: gold defined by the kernel's own string-equality ('oracle-favourable eval design' loses its gold-definition leg; the constrained IF-C answer surface remains and stays disclosed). It does NOT license: external question-STYLE ecological validity (public-benchmark surfaces remain unmeasured for system lift — the deterministic verifier cannot engage them: MEASURED byte-identical verify/alone d-ext vectors in f2b-replicate); any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 — MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage — restated mandatorily); any PRM-class comparison (HC3 stays indexed to the 1.5B class tested in f2b-replicate; no PRM arm here); any scale language beyond sign-only (the s->S gap narrows as S grows, so absolute verifier catch-room shrinks with scale; cascade/verification-routing literature licenses mechanism existence above 7B, never effect size). A FAIL by kill (d) is symmetrically scoped: it kills the kernel-content claim for THIS kernel instance at this rung, not the verify-retry mechanism as such.
hypotheses: H-TRANSFER (load-bearing): the kernel-verify-retry lift over model-alone survives when item gold is adjudicated independently of the kernel by blind judges (data/d-adj-t protocol) — i.e. the f2b-replicate lift is real semantic content, not definitional circularity; operationalised as absolute superiority of 135M+kernel-verify-retry (fixed k=4) over 135M-alone on externally-adjudicated gold

H-CIRC (the alternative under test, killed or supported symmetrically): the F2-line lift exists only because d-qa/d-qa-r gold was DEFINED by the same string-equality the verifier checks; predicts blind-endorsement A near chance (stage-1 kill d fires with zero GPU spend) and/or no external-gold lift (kill a)

H-STRUCT carry-over: any external-gold lift must remain kernel-CONTENT-specific — the seed-pinned shuffled-record derangement at identical retry topology and cost recovers <30% of it (kill b otherwise)
RT-2 carry-over on external gold: the kernel arm cannot PASS without beating gloss-text self-verify+retry at matched budget and FLOPs (kill c otherwise)
kill_criterion_verbatim: f2b-TRANSFER kills (fixed pre-registered k=4, 250 externally-labelled items, 3 seeds; every accuracy on BLIND-ADJUDICATED external gold): (d) STAGE-1, BEFORE ANY GPU — external endorsement A (share of resolved blind adjudications where external gold equals membership gold; concordant cannot-say counts as disagreement) has one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound < 0.70 => the kernel's own content fails blind external adjudication; the definitional-circularity reading is supported at this kernel instance and NO GPU is spent (the FAIL verdict is producible from the stage-1 record alone). (a) primary fails => the verifier lift does not survive ground-truth-independent gold; the transfer claim is dead and verifier-offload stays blocked beyond the self-authored slice. (b) SHUFFLED-verify recovers >= 30% of true-verify's external-gold lift-over-alone (point estimate) => the external-gold lift is retry-against-any-oracle STRUCTURE, not kernel CONTENT, and the kernel-specific claim dies at any accuracy. (c) gloss-text self-verify closes as much external-gold lift at <= matched FLOPs/query (F0 ledger, point estimates) => Law-2 / commodity-verification kill. Nulls require TOST (equivalence to R1-alone at margin h=0.2). Degeneracy discipline: verifier non-engagement (the F2/d-ext vacuity signature), judge-quality failure, and baseline saturation are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — they can never read as FAIL, PASS, or NULL.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: pinned directly at design time (same revisions as f2b-replicate; backends already built and Modal-smoked there); NO PRM in this design

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN (fresh-runs pre-commitment, prereg_doc §5): the logged f2/f2b-replicate rows for these arm x rung cells CANNOT serve as this record's arm outputs even in principle — (1) the eval corpus differs (d-qa-t, new generator seed, LC8-t prompt-surface-disjoint from d-qa AND d-qa-r; the collision is 'indeterminate' only because the d-qa-t corpus pin is a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder at freeze time), (2) every endpoint here is scored against blind externally-adjudicated gold (d-adj-t) that does not exist for any logged row, and (3) the logged-result reuse ruling is under revision at design time, so this design pre-commits to fresh final-phase runs for every cell; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision

runner_constraints.hardware: single GPU (A100-40GB or A10G); image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes before any final-phase run
runner_constraints.harness: poc/f2b-transfer (stage-1 adjudication tooling + stage-2 GPU runner adapted from poc/f2b: drop PRM/text/d-ext, add dual scoring + verifier_engagement block + adjudication-instrument record; poc/f2b is left byte-identical to its f2b-replicate pin). STAGE DISCIPLINE: stage-1 adjudication record and its verdict-gen read PRECEDE any GPU spend; reuse-check + dry-plan + mock precede the final run; auto-authorization under $100 applies ONLY after maintainer sign-off of this design

title: f2b-transfer — ground-truth-independence test of the verifier-offload lift: the f2b-replicate arms re-run FRESH on kernel-covered items whose gold labels are fixed by BLIND EXTERNAL ADJUDICATION (never by the kernel's own string-equality), with a pre-GPU stage-1 endorsement kill, a structural engagement gate (the RT-7a vacuity fixed for real), the shuffled-kernel content control carried over, and an absolute superiority primary on external gold; right-sized (250 items, 3 seeds, fixed k=4, no PRM / no text-null / no cascades / no benchmark slice); adjudicates the real-content-vs-definitional-circularity residual that f2b-replicate's PASS explicitly could not close
